data.title: GDScript 2.0: Cannot use default values with typed arrays
Enabling fullscreen via code shows window border at screen edges (DisplayServer regression)
Keep crash handler status on editor restart
Renaming a TSCN to ESCN does not generate lods
Split generated RST for class reference based on the base type
Improve the autogenerated note in RST docs for class reference
Color: Fix resetting alpha when setting H/S/V separately
Can't transform Plane as it lacks `operator *`
Color's alpha is set to one when setting `h`, `s`, or `v`.
Add `init_bone_poses()` to `Skeleton3D`
Numpad Home and End keys appear to do nothing
Use `appCategory` attribute of android set to game
Added node for Navigation links
Fix `FOG` built-in in spatial/fragment shader
Remove unnecessary ScrollContainer scrollbar logic
Enable FXAA by default on viewports
